66 Unique Gifts for the Woman Who Has Everything

Consider this your guide to shopping for the extremely chic women in your life.

By Hannah Oh, Maggie GriswoldPublished: Dec 16, 2025

We may earn commission from links on this page, but we only recommend products we love. Promise.

Hello, sweet, lost soul that’s wandered here looking for some shopping help. Do you have a very cool person in your life whose general coolness makes it very difficult to shop for them? Perhaps an extremely chic and picky mother-in-law or a stylish coworker whose name you drew for the company-wide Secret Santa? Never fear, because as a longtime shopping editor, I’ve taken it upon myself to put together a list of the best gifts for women in 2025.

First things first: Think outside the box. I'm not saying a nice mug or pair of socks isn't a great gift, but I can almost guarantee you that the recipient has a couple of each that they already love. There should be something extra-unique about the gift, whether it's a new brand they haven't heard of or some sort of unique feature. Also, you've got to keep their personality in mind. That's a non-negotiable. Maybe they're really into luxurious showers, traveling in style, or decking out their handbags?

The best gifts for women at a glance:

  • this luxurious towel heater

    Keenray Towel Warmer

    Read more

  • this clever makeup bag

    EACHY Travel Makeup Bag

    Read more

  • this personalized book stamp

    Custom Library Stamp

    Read more

Wait, what's the shipping deadline for Christmas?

Look at you thinking ahead, you! Great question. To keep things short and sweet: It's almost too late, but you can still beat the clock via a few methods. USPS requires you to ship by December 17 or 18 for their Ground, First Class, or Priority services, but UPS and Fedex can make a Christmas delivery happen as long as you ship by December 23 at the very, very latest (and shell out some extra cash for the expedited service.) And then there's always Amazon Prime: If you're a member, you might be able to score two-day or even overnight shipping, depending on the individual item. But don't wait!

Now if you're feeling stuck and crunched for time, below, you'll find 60 gift ideas for the woman who has everything. There's bound to be one (or two, or three) gifts that fits the bill.

SHOP EVEN MORE GIFT IDEAS HERE

Best Deal
Great Jones Little Hottie Pan
$60$30
NOW50%OFF
JUMP TO REVIEW
1
this luxurious towel heater

Keenray Towel Warmer

$147AmazonAlso Consider
$96Wayfair

The gift of being wrapped in a warm towel that feels like it's straight out of the dryer sounds like one heck of a gift to me. Toss towels or a bathrobe into this device pre-shower, and they'll be perfectly toasty when you step out.

2
this clever makeup bag

EACHY Travel Makeup Bag

Now 30% Off
$29 $20Amazon

This affordable makeup pouch opens up wide and flat, giving you easy visibility and access to all of your toiletries. It also has handy dividers and pockets for sorting smaller items and comes in a ton of colors!

Advertisement - Continue Reading Below
3
this personalized book stamp

Custom Library Stamp

Now 25% Off
$12 $9Etsy

Turn their little book collection into an official ~home library~ with a custom “From the library of…” stamp. You can choose between a wood stamp with an ink pad or a self-inking stamp!

4
this unlimited "disposable" camera

Camp Snap Pro Camera

Now 15% Off
$99 $84campsnapphoto.com

I've reviewed several iterations of the screen-free, digital Camp Snap camera at this point, and this one is easily the best. It has a strong flash and several filters you can scroll through within the camera, and it takes hundreds of photos with the "disposable" effect that you don't have to take to a lab to get developed. Just plug it into your computer or phone, and voila!

Advertisement - Continue Reading Below
5
this viral wallet

Kate Spade Morgan Matchbox Embossed Wallet

$118Kate Spade

If the person you're shopping for always grabs a matchbook from every restaurant and hotel they visit, go for this matchbox wallet from Kate Spade. TikTok is obsessed with it, and they will be, too!

6
this romantic trinket box

Anthropologie Bistro Tile Stoneware Trinket Box

Now 30% Off
$18 $13Anthropologie

For a last-minute stocking stuffer that won't break the bank, how about a little trinket box?! This mosaic container from Anthro adorably looks like a love letter and runs under $20.

Advertisement - Continue Reading Below
7
this chic travel makeup bag

Saie Vanity Case

$48saiehello.com

The Saie case is practically a cool girl necessity at this point. It's made of structured leather and comes with a removable divider inside for easy organization.

8
my favorite blanket ever

Lola Smoky Skies Blanket

$325lolablankets.com

I've said it before and I'll say it again—I've owned this Lola blanket for a few years, and every single guest that's ever visited my apartment has gushed over how soft and warm it is. It's probably one of the best blankets in the entire world (read my full review here!)

Advertisement - Continue Reading Below
9
these reusable eye patches

Dieux Forever Eye Mask

Now 35% Off
$50 $32AmazonAlso Consider
$25dieuxskin.com$25Soko Glam

Dubbed by the brand as "the last eye mask you'll ever need," these reusable patches can be applied right over your eye creams and serums as a sustainable alternative to single-use patches. I was gifted these two years ago, and love using them over eye cream.

10
this little suede bag

Free People Sierra Suede Shoulder Bag

$78Free People

A perfectly-sized bag that's equal parts chic and practical—and yes, it'll hold all their trinkets and a book or two.

Advertisement - Continue Reading Below
11
this cute tumbler

HydroJug 40 oz. Traveler

$45Anthropologie

IMO, HydroJug tumblers are elite—they keep drinks super cold and get so many compliments wherever I go. This striped one is gorgeous!

12
these shower steamers

Uncommon Goods Calming Shower Steamers Gift Set

$34Uncommon Goods

Love an aromatherapy moment. And while bath bombs are great, these are perfect for the person who prefers showers (but still wants a spa vibe).

Advertisement - Continue Reading Below
13
this DIY book nook

Rolife DIY Book Nook Kit

$47Amazon

Calling all crafty girls—these DIY book nooks are so fun to put together and look adorable on a bookshelf. If your giftee has been wanting to lessen their screen time, this is the perfect pick.

14
these cutesy S&P shakers

Hugging Turtles Salt and Pepper Shaker

$17Amazon

The fact that these salt and pepper shakers are little turtles?! And they're hugging?! Take my money rn.

Advertisement - Continue Reading Below
15
these colorful glasses

Anthropologie Morgan Wine Glasses

$56Anthropologie

These chic wine glasses come in quite a few colors, and would look incredible on anyone's shelf or bar cart. And a set of four for under $60? Yes, please.

16

Longchamp Le Roseau M Hobo Bag

$820longchamp.com

A cool bag that's well-constructed and holds their laptop without it sticking out the top is a very rare and coveted thing. The Le Roseau Hobo bag from Longchamp does it all seamlessly!

Advertisement - Continue Reading Below
17
this artistic book

A Year of Junk Journaling by Martina Calvi

Now 20% Off
$25 $20Amazon

Shopping for a crafty person? This pretty book is a coffee table book meets crafting guide that takes the reader through turning everyday scraps into scrapbooking art. Plus, there are tons of gorgeous visual example, making the book seriously so enjoyable to look at.

18
this microcurrent device

NuFACE® MINI+ On-the-Go Facial Toning Starter Kit

$250AmazonAlso Consider
$250Nordstrom$250Neiman Marcus

If their FYP is anything like mine, they’ve been seeing tons of content about at-home microcurrent devices that take your skincare routine to new heights. This one gives the face a more sculpted appearance using painless electrical currents! Our beauty editors reviewed the NuFACE here.

Advertisement - Continue Reading Below
19
this cutie lunch bag

Calpak Insulated Lunch Bag

Shop at Calpak

If you've got a corporate baddie in your life, they'll definitely appreciate a lunch (or snack!) bag that's actually cute enough to show off at the office.

20
this viral beauty set

Rhode Holiday Glazed Trio Gift Set

$77Amazon

Think that celebrity beauty products are overhyped? Think again. Associate Editor Meg Uy loves and rides for Rhode's skincare, especially the Glazing Milk (which is included in this set along with two of their iconic lip peptide treatments).

Hannah Oh
Shopping Editor

Hannah is the Shopping Editor at Cosmopolitan, covering all things from chic home decor to trendy fashion finds, TikTok products that are actually worth your $$$, and the perfect gift to buy for your boyfriend's mom. She previously wrote for Seventeen and CR Fashion Book. Follow her on Instagram for hot takes on red carpet fashion and pictures of her office outfits that nobody asked for. 

Maggie Griswold
Contributing Fashion Editor
Maggie Griswold (she/her) is a contributing fashion editor for Cosmopolitan and freelance writer and editor based in Los Angeles, covering everything from the latest wardrobe must-haves to interior design trends. Along with Cosmopolitan, you can find her work on Oprah Daily, StyleCaster, Women's Health, and House Digest, among others. She's a big (read: ridiculously huge) fan of the '90s sitcom Frasier, all things Shakespeare, and a good romance-filled YA novel. Follow her on Instagram.
